mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbound_order_item ( outbound_order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price, amount, remark ) VALUES ( #{outboundOrderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.specification, p.unit, i.quantity, i.unit_price, i.amount, i.remark FROM outbound_order_item i LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.outbound_order_id = #{outboundOrderId} ORDER BY i.id ASC
